training_status: experienced weight trainer with focus on hypertrophy and muscle contraction

benefits.description: Noticed a huge difference in muscle growth when combined with proper diet, training, and other supplements
Holistic doctor confirmed hormone levels look amazing, better than expected for his age range without steroids

side_effects.description: GI upset (sitting on the porcelain throne) if dose is too high

protocol_notes: On blast and cruise basically since late summer of the prior year. Uses keto/hunter-gatherer diet, intermittent fasting on non-workout days. Stack includes L-arginine/L-ornithine, beta ecdysterone, turkesterone, 15g creatine, pre-workout. Sauna/steam room used to amplify GH effect. Titrated up to current 250mcg total per dose split as 150mg morning and 100mg night. Decreased dose significantly then took a short break before starting a new cycle.
